title: Place more than one date in the Date column to generate a more harmonious Gantt visual with recurring tasks.

posts.author: Raffaela (Raffaela)
posts.cookedHtml:
Place more than one date in the Date column to generate a more harmonious Gantt visual with recurring tasks.

I would like to place the Date column (not timeline) to allow me to select several dates because when developing a Gantt visual this recurring tasks are seen in a single task and only on the days that are going to be performed.
